query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "mobileforge: annotation-free adaptation for mobile gui agents with hie" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational overview and canonical reference for the specific domain of GUI agents, providing the necessary methodological context (Reinforcement Learning) and taxonomy that a literature review on extending mobile GUI agent adaptation would require. While it does not specifically mention "MobileForge" or "annotation-free" techniques, it establishes the broader empirical and theoretical baseline for the "GUI Agents" variable in the user's question.
